title: Dense connectomic reconstruction in layer 4 of the somatosensory cortex
abstract: Dense reconstruction of ~500,000 cubic micrometers from layer 4 of mouse barrel cortex yielded 2.7m of neuronal cables implementing a connectome of ~400,000 synapses between 34,221 axons and 11,400 postsynaptic processes — 300x larger than previous dense cortical reconstructions.
notes: Already in existing 102. Largest dense cortical connectome at publication.
